home -> accesso al menu a fondo — transition=“si”; explanation="starts the process"
accesso al menu a fondo -> sezione di monitoraggio — transition=“si”; explanation="navigates to monitoring section"
accesso al menu a fondo -> note — transition=“no”; explanation="goes to note section"
note -> ritorno alla home — transition=“no”; explanation="returns to home"
sezione di monitoraggio -> accesso al menu a fondo — transition=“no”; explanation="returns to menu"
flow 1: home -> accesso al menu a fondo (si) -> sezione di monitoraggio (si) -> accesso al menu a fondo (no) -> note (no) -> ritorno alla home (no)
* the diagram represents a simple navigation flow within a webpage.
* the user can navigate between the home page, the menu, the monitoring section, and the notes section.
* the "no" transitions indicate that the user can return to the menu from any of the other sections.
